summary: Immediate craftable results from the current inventory, ranking mode, station filters, and result quantities.
A recursive single-target planner that prefers current inventory first and shows missing leaves when the path fails.
An aggregated missing-items builder for multiple targets, using the current inventory and craftable intermediates.
A slot-based near-craft view showing recipes that are close to craftable based on the live inventory.
A browse, search, and filter view over the full recipe dataset, ingredient groups, and item metadata.
